core_mechanism: coarse-graining of many-body microscopic dynamics into continuum transport equations via an Enskog/Boltzmann-type collisional kinetic equation with moment closure, yielding explicit transport coefficients and an order-disorder symmetry-breaking phase transition
brief_reason: The abstract explicitly coarse-grains the microscopic agent dynamics into macroscopic transport equations using an Enskog-type kinetic theory that supplies all transport coefficients and a disorder-to-order phase transition, which is the general kinetic-to-hydrodynamic reduction machinery independent of the flocking subject matter.
